mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SRBA_ETC_I (BAS_YYMM , RSK_ELMT_C, RA_ITEM_CODE, RA_ITEM_NM, RSK_VALT_ITEM, RA_ITEM_CD, RA_ST_INTV_VAL, RA_ET_INTV_VAL, RA_ITEM_SCR, ABS_HRSK_YN, DR_DT, DR_TIME) SELECT #{basYymm} BAS_YYMM , RSK_ELMT_C , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NM , RSK_VALT_ITEM , RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ST_INTV_VAL , RA_ET_INTV_VAL , RA_ITEM_SCR , ABS_HRSK_YN , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM ( SELECT A.RA_ITEM_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CODE , B.RSK_ELMT_C_NM AS RA_ITEM_NM , A.ABS_HRSK_YN , A.RA_ITEM_SCR , A.RA_ST_INTV_VAL , A.RA_ET_INTV_VAL , B.RSK_CATG2_C , B.RSK_ELMT_C , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM FROM RA_ITEM_COMMON_REQ A , ( SELECT RSK_CATG2_C, RSK_ELMT_C , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = RSK_ELMT_C AND GRP_C = 'S003' ) AS RSK_ELMT_C_NM , RSK_VALT_ITEM , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = RSK_VALT_ITEM AND GRP_C = 'R342' ) AS RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM , CASE WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34219' THEN 'B001' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34220' THEN 'B002' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34221' THEN 'B003' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34222' THEN 'B004' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34223' THEN 'B005' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34224' THEN 'B006' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34225' THEN 'B007' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34226' THEN 'B008' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34227' THEN 'B009' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34228' THEN 'B010' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34229' THEN 'B011' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34230' THEN 'B012' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34231' THEN 'B013' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34232' THEN 'B014' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34233' THEN 'B015' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34234' THEN 'B016' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34235' THEN 'B017' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34236' THEN 'B018' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34237' THEN 'B019' ELSE '' END AS RA_ITEM_CD FROM SRBA_RISK_ELMT_M WHERE RSK_CATG1_C = 'R5' --거래 AND BAS_YYMM = (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_RISK_ELMT_M ) ) B WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = B.RA_ITEM_CD AND A.RA_ITEM_SCR > 0 )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M ( BAS_YYMM , BRNO , RSK_CATG1_C , RSK_ELMT_C , INDV_CORP_CCD , SRVC_G_C , RSK_VALT_ITEM , JIPYO_V , UNFY_YN , DR_DT , DR_TIME ) SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM , M.BRNO AS BRNO , SUBSTR(M.RSK_ELMT_C,1,2) AS RSK_CATG1_C , M.RSK_ELMT_C , ' ' AS INDV_CORP_CCD , ' ' AS SRVC_G_C , M.RSK_VALT_ITEM , NVL(JIPYO_V,0) JIPYO_V , 0 AS UNFY_YN , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME FROM ( SELECT KRI.RSK_ELMT_C , KRI.BRNO , RM.RSK_VALT_ITEM , SUM( PRS_QT_CUST_CNT ) AS JIPYO_V FROM SRBA_KRI_D KRI , SRBA_RISK_ELMT_M RM , SRBA_VALT_BRNO BR WHERE 1=1 AND KRI.BAS_YYMM >= #{basYymmS} AND KRI.BAS_YYMM <= #{basYymmE} AND KRI.BAS_LONG = '00' AND RM.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND RM.USE_YN = '1' AND KRI.RSK_ELMT_C = RM.RSK_ELMT_C AND KRI.BRNO = BR.BRNO AND BR.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} GROUP BY KRI.RSK_ELMT_C, KRI.BRNO , RM.RSK_VALT_ITEM ) M

INSERT INTO SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M ( BAS_YYMM , BRNO , RSK_CATG1_C , RSK_ELMT_C , INDV_CORP_CCD , SRVC_G_C , RSK_VALT_ITEM , JIPYO_V , UNFY_YN , DR_DT , DR_TIME ) SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM , BRN_CD , SUBSTR(RSK_ELMT_C,1,2) AS RSK_CATG1_C , RSK_ELMT_C , ' ' AS INDV_CORP_CCD , SRVC_G_C , RSK_VALT_ITEM , NVL(JIPYO_V,0) JIPYO_V , 0 AS UNFY_YN ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM ( SELECT BRN_CD , RSK_ELMT_C , SRVC_G_C , RSK_VALT_ITEM , SUM(NVL(JIPYO_V,0)) JIPYO_V FROM ( SELECT A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C AS RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE AS SRVC_G_C , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , COUNT(A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM (
SELECT NVL(CUS.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000') AS BRN_CD ,M.DL_P_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO ,COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM NIC66B M , NIC01B CUS WHERE M.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND M.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT <= #{tgtTrnEdt} AND M.DL_P_RNMCNO = CUS.RNMCNO(+) GROUP BY NVL(CUS.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000'), M.DL_P_RNMCNO ) A JOIN SRBA_ETC_I B ON A.CNT BETWEEN B.RA_ST_INTV_VAL AND B.RA_ET_INTV_VAL AND B.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND B.RSK_ELMT_C = 'R50101' GROUP BY A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM
UNION ALL
SELECT A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C AS RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE AS SRVC_G_C , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , COUNT(A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM (
SELECT NVL(CUS.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000') AS BRN_CD ,M.SSPS_TYP_CD AS RNMCNO ,COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM NIC66B M , NIC01B CUS WHERE M.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND M.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT <= #{tgtTrnEdt} AND M.DL_P_RNMCNO = CUS.RNMCNO(+) GROUP BY NVL(CUS.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000'), M.SSPS_TYP_CD ) A JOIN SRBA_ETC_I B ON A.CNT BETWEEN B.RA_ST_INTV_VAL AND B.RA_ET_INTV_VAL AND B.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND B.RSK_ELMT_C = 'R50102' GROUP BY A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM
UNION ALL
SELECT A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C AS RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE AS SRVC_G_C , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , COUNT(A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM (
SELECT NVL(CUS.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000') AS BRN_CD ,M.DL_P_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO ,COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM NIC66B M , NIC01B CUS WHERE M.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND M.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT <= #{tgtTrnEdt} AND M.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC') AND M.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN ('99','10') AND M.DL_P_RNMCNO = CUS.RNMCNO(+) GROUP BY NVL(CUS.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000'), M.DL_P_RNMCNO ) A JOIN SRBA_ETC_I B ON A.CNT BETWEEN B.RA_ST_INTV_VAL AND B.RA_ET_INTV_VAL AND B.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND B.RSK_ELMT_C = 'R50103' GROUP BY A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM
UNION ALL
SELECT A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C AS RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE AS SRVC_G_C , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , COUNT(A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM (
SELECT NVL(CUS.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000') AS BRN_CD ,A.DL_P_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO ,ROUND(SUM(DL_AMT)/COUNT(DISTINCT A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT||A.SSPS_DL_ID ),2) AS AVG FROM NIC66B A, NIC75B B , NIC01B CUS WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT <= #{tgtTrnEdt} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC') AND A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN ('99','10') AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = CUS.RNMCNO(+) GROUP BY NVL(CUS.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000'), A.DL_P_RNMCNO ) A JOIN SRBA_ETC_I B ON A.AVG BETWEEN B.RA_ST_INTV_VAL AND B.RA_ET_INTV_VAL AND B.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND B.RSK_ELMT_C = 'R50104' GROUP BY A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM
UNION ALL
SELECT A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C AS RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE AS SRVC_G_C , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , COUNT(A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM (
SELECT NVL(CUS.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000') AS BRN_CD ,M.DL_P_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO ,COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM NIC66B M , NIC01B CUS WHERE M.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND M.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT <= #{tgtTrnEdt} AND M.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR','CAC') AND M.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN ('99','10') AND M.DL_P_RNMCNO = CUS.RNMCNO(+) GROUP BY NVL(CUS.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000'), M.DL_P_RNMCNO ) A JOIN SRBA_ETC_I B ON A.CNT BETWEEN B.RA_ST_INTV_VAL AND B.RA_ET_INTV_VAL AND B.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND B.RSK_ELMT_C = 'R50105' GROUP BY A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM
UNION ALL
SELECT A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C AS RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE AS SRVC_G_C , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , COUNT(A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM (
SELECT NVL(CUS.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000') AS BRN_CD ,A.DL_P_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO ,ROUND(AVG(DL_AMT),2) AS AVG FROM NIC66B A, NIC75B B , NIC01B CUS WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT <= #{tgtTrnEdt} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR','CAC') AND A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN ('99','10') AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = CUS.RNMCNO(+) GROUP BY NVL(CUS.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000'), A.DL_P_RNMCNO ) A JOIN SRBA_ETC_I B ON A.AVG BETWEEN B.RA_ST_INTV_VAL AND B.RA_ET_INTV_VAL AND B.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND B.RSK_ELMT_C = 'R50106' GROUP BY A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM
UNION ALL
SELECT A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C AS RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE AS SRVC_G_C , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , COUNT(A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM ( SELECT NVL(CUS.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000') AS BRN_CD ,B.AFPR_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO ,COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM NIC66B A, NIC102B B , NIC01B CUS WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT <= #{tgtTrnEdt} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC') AND A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN ('99','10') AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = CUS.RNMCNO(+) GROUP BY NVL(CUS.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000'), B.AFPR_RNMCNO ) A JOIN SRBA_ETC_I B ON A.CNT BETWEEN B.RA_ST_INTV_VAL AND B.RA_ET_INTV_VAL AND B.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND B.RSK_ELMT_C = 'R50107' GROUP BY A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM
UNION ALL
SELECT A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C AS RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE AS SRVC_G_C , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , COUNT(A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM (
SELECT NVL(CUS.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000') AS BRN_CD ,C.AFPR_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO ,ROUND(SUM(DL_AMT)/COUNT(DISTINCT A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT||A.SSPS_DL_ID ),2) AS AVG FROM NIC66B A, NIC75B B, NIC102B C , NIC01B CUS WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT <= #{tgtTrnEdt} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC') AND A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN ('99','10') AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = CUS.RNMCNO(+) GROUP BY NVL(CUS.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000'), C.AFPR_RNMCNO ) A JOIN SRBA_ETC_I B ON A.AVG BETWEEN B.RA_ST_INTV_VAL AND B.RA_ET_INTV_VAL AND B.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND B.RSK_ELMT_C = 'R50108' GROUP BY A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM
UNION ALL
SELECT A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C AS RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE AS SRVC_G_C , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , COUNT(A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM ( SELECT NVL(CUS.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000') AS BRN_CD ,B.AFPR_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO ,COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM NIC66B A, NIC102B B , NIC01B CUS WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT <= #{tgtTrnEdt} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR','CAC') AND A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN ('99','10') AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = CUS.RNMCNO(+) GROUP BY NVL(CUS.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000'), B.AFPR_RNMCNO ) A JOIN SRBA_ETC_I B ON A.CNT BETWEEN B.RA_ST_INTV_VAL AND B.RA_ET_INTV_VAL AND B.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND B.RSK_ELMT_C = 'R50109' GROUP BY A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM
UNION ALL
SELECT A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C AS RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE AS SRVC_G_C , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , COUNT(A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM (
SELECT NVL(CUS.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000') AS BRN_CD ,C.AFPR_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO ,ROUND(SUM(DL_AMT)/COUNT(DISTINCT A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT||A.SSPS_DL_ID ),2) AS AVG FROM NIC66B A, NIC75B B, NIC102B C , NIC01B CUS WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT <= #{tgtTrnEdt} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR','CAC') AND A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN ('99','10') AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = CUS.RNMCNO(+) GROUP BY NVL(CUS.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000'), C.AFPR_RNMCNO ) A JOIN SRBA_ETC_I B ON A.AVG BETWEEN B.RA_ST_INTV_VAL AND B.RA_ET_INTV_VAL AND B.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND B.RSK_ELMT_C = 'R50110' GROUP BY A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM
UNION ALL
SELECT A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C AS RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE AS SRVC_G_C , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , COUNT(A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM ( SELECT NVL(NIC01.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000') AS BRN_CD , NIC32.RNMCNO AS RNMCNO , NVL(SUM(NIC32.MM_ITRN_AMT),0) AS JIPYO_V FROM NIC32B NIC32 , NIC01B NIC01 WHERE NIC32.BAS_YYMM >= #{basYymmS} AND NIC32.BAS_YYMM <= #{basYymmE} AND NIC32.RNMCNO = NIC01.RNMCNO(+) GROUP BY NIC32.RNMCNO , NIC01.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD ) A JOIN SRBA_ETC_I B ON A.JIPYO_V BETWEEN B.RA_ST_INTV_VAL AND B.RA_ET_INTV_VAL AND B.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND B.RSK_ELMT_C = 'R50201' GROUP BY A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM
UNION ALL
SELECT A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C AS RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE AS SRVC_G_C , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , COUNT(A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM ( SELECT NVL(NIC01.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000') AS BRN_CD , NIC32.RNMCNO AS RNMCNO , NVL(SUM(NIC32.MM_OTRN_AMT),0) AS JIPYO_V FROM NIC32B NIC32 , NIC01B NIC01 WHERE NIC32.BAS_YYMM >= #{basYymmS} AND NIC32.BAS_YYMM <= #{basYymmE} AND NIC32.RNMCNO = NIC01.RNMCNO(+) GROUP BY NIC32.RNMCNO , NIC01.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD ) A JOIN SRBA_ETC_I B ON A.JIPYO_V BETWEEN B.RA_ST_INTV_VAL AND B.RA_ET_INTV_VAL AND B.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND B.RSK_ELMT_C = 'R50202' GROUP BY A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM
UNION ALL
SELECT A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C AS RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE AS SRVC_G_C , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , COUNT(A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM ( SELECT NVL(NIC01.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000') AS BRN_CD , NIC32.RNMCNO AS RNMCNO , NVL(SUM(NIC32.MM_BOND_AMT),0) AS JIPYO_V FROM NIC32B NIC32 , NIC01B NIC01 WHERE NIC32.BAS_YYMM >= #{basYymmS} AND NIC32.BAS_YYMM <= #{basYymmE} AND NIC32.RNMCNO = NIC01.RNMCNO(+) GROUP BY NIC32.RNMCNO , NIC01.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD ) A JOIN SRBA_ETC_I B ON A.JIPYO_V BETWEEN B.RA_ST_INTV_VAL AND B.RA_ET_INTV_VAL AND B.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND B.RSK_ELMT_C = 'R50203' GROUP BY A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM
UNION ALL
SELECT A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C AS RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE AS SRVC_G_C , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , COUNT(A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM ( SELECT NVL(NIC01.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000') AS BRN_CD , NIC32.RNMCNO AS RNMCNO , NVL(SUM(NIC32.MM_WAHO_CNT + NIC32.MM_RELE_CNT),0) AS JIPYO_V FROM NIC32B NIC32 , NIC01B NIC01 WHERE NIC32.BAS_YYMM >= #{basYymmS} AND NIC32.BAS_YYMM <= #{basYymmE} AND NIC32.RNMCNO = NIC01.RNMCNO(+) GROUP BY NIC32.RNMCNO , NIC01.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD ) A JOIN SRBA_ETC_I B ON A.JIPYO_V BETWEEN B.RA_ST_INTV_VAL AND B.RA_ET_INTV_VAL AND B.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND B.RSK_ELMT_C = 'R50204' GROUP BY A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM
UNION ALL
SELECT A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C AS RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE AS SRVC_G_C , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , COUNT(A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM ( SELECT NVL(NIC01.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000') AS BRN_CD , NIC32.RNMCNO AS RNMCNO , NVL(SUM(NIC32.MM_REAC_ITRN_AMT + NIC32.MM_REAC_OTRN_AMT),0) AS JIPYO_V FROM NIC32B NIC32 , NIC01B NIC01 WHERE NIC32.BAS_YYMM >= #{basYymmS} AND NIC32.BAS_YYMM <= #{basYymmE} AND NIC32.RNMCNO = NIC01.RNMCNO(+) GROUP BY NIC32.RNMCNO , NIC01.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD ) A JOIN SRBA_ETC_I B ON A.JIPYO_V BETWEEN B.RA_ST_INTV_VAL AND B.RA_ET_INTV_VAL AND B.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND B.RSK_ELMT_C = 'R50205' GROUP BY A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM
UNION ALL
SELECT A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C AS RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE AS SRVC_G_C , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , COUNT(A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM ( SELECT BRN_CD , RNMCNO , NVL(SUM(JIPYO_V),0) AS JIPYO_V FROM ( SELECT NVL(NIC01.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000') AS BRN_CD , NIC32.RNMCNO AS RNMCNO , TRUNC( CASE WHEN (NIC32.MM_ITRN_CNT + NIC32.MM_OTRN_CNT) = 0 THEN 0.00 ELSE (((NIC32.MM_CASH_ITRN_CNT + NIC32.MM_CASH_OTRN_CNT)/(NIC32.MM_ITRN_CNT + NIC32.MM_OTRN_CNT)) * 10) END, 2) AS JIPYO_V FROM NIC32B NIC32 , NIC01B NIC01 WHERE NIC32.BAS_YYMM >= #{basYymmS} AND NIC32.BAS_YYMM <= #{basYymmE} AND NIC32.RNMCNO = NIC01.RNMCNO(+) ) GROUP BY RNMCNO , BRN_CD
) A JOIN SRBA_ETC_I B ON A.JIPYO_V BETWEEN B.RA_ST_INTV_VAL AND B.RA_ET_INTV_VAL AND B.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND B.RSK_ELMT_C = 'R50206' GROUP BY A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM
UNION ALL
SELECT A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C AS RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE AS SRVC_G_C , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , COUNT(A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM ( SELECT NVL(NIC01.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000') AS BRN_CD , NIC32.RNMCNO AS RNMCNO , NVL(SUM(NIC32.MM_CARD_NEW_CNT),0) AS JIPYO_V FROM NIC32B NIC32 , NIC01B NIC01 WHERE NIC32.BAS_YYMM >= #{basYymmS} AND NIC32.BAS_YYMM <= #{basYymmE} AND NIC32.RNMCNO = NIC01.RNMCNO(+) GROUP BY NIC32.RNMCNO , NIC01.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD ) A JOIN SRBA_ETC_I B ON A.JIPYO_V BETWEEN B.RA_ST_INTV_VAL AND B.RA_ET_INTV_VAL AND B.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND B.RSK_ELMT_C = 'R50207' GROUP BY A.BRN_CD , B.RSK_ELMT_C , B.RA_ITEM_CODE , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM
UNION ALL
SELECT A.BRN_CD , 'R50209' AS RSK_ELMT_C , ' ' AS SRVC_G_C , 'R50209' AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , COUNT(A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM ( SELECT NVL(NIC01.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000') AS BRN_CD , NIC32.RNMCNO AS RNMCNO , NVL(SUM(NIC32.MM_TUOP_TRN_CNT),0) as JIPYO_V FROM NIC32B NIC32 , NIC01B NIC01 WHERE NIC32.BAS_YYMM >= #{basYymmS} AND NIC32.BAS_YYMM <= #{basYymmE} AND NIC32.RNMCNO = NIC01.RNMCNO(+) GROUP BY NIC32.RNMCNO , NIC01.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD ) A GROUP BY A.BRN_CD
UNION ALL
SELECT A.BRN_CD , 'R50208' AS RSK_ELMT_C , ' ' AS SRVC_G_C , 'R50208' AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , COUNT(A.RNMCNO) AS JIPYO_V FROM ( SELECT NVL(NIC01.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000') AS BRN_CD , NIC32.RNMCNO AS RNMCNO , NVL(SUM(NIC32.MM_TRN_REAC_CNT),0) as JIPYO_V FROM NIC32B NIC32 , NIC01B NIC01 WHERE NIC32.BAS_YYMM >= #{basYymmS} AND NIC32.BAS_YYMM <= #{basYymmE} AND NIC32.RNMCNO = NIC01.RNMCNO(+) GROUP BY NIC32.RNMCNO , NIC01.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD ) A GROUP BY A.BRN_CD
) , SRBA_VALT_BRNO BR WHERE BRN_CD = BR.BRNO AND BR.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} GROUP BY BRN_CD, RSK_ELMT_C, SRVC_G_C , RSK_VALT_ITEM )

INSERT INTO SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M ( BAS_YYMM , BRNO , RSK_CATG1_C , RSK_ELMT_C , INDV_CORP_CCD , SRVC_G_C , RSK_VALT_ITEM , JIPYO_V , UNFY_YN , DR_DT , DR_TIME ) SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM , '99999' AS BRNO , SUBSTR(RSK_ELMT_C,1,2) AS RSK_CATG1_C , RSK_ELMT_C , ' ' AS INDV_CORP_CCD , SRVC_G_C , RSK_VALT_ITEM , NVL(JIPYO_V,0) JIPYO_V , 0 AS UNFY_YN ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM ( SELECT RSK_ELMT_C, RSK_VALT_ITEM, SRVC_G_C , AVG(JIPYO_V) AS JIPYO_V FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND BRNO != '99999' GROUP BY RSK_ELMT_C, RSK_VALT_ITEM, SRVC_G_C )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE ( BAS_YYMM , BRNO , RSK_CATG1_C , RSK_ELMT_C , SRVC_G_C , RSK_VALT_ITEM , JIPYO_V , JIPYO_SCORE , DR_DT , DR_TIME ) SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM , RSK_ALL.BRNO AS BRNO , SUBSTR(RSK_ALL.RSK_ELMT_C,1,2) AS RSK_CATG1_C , RSK_ALL.RSK_ELMT_C AS RSK_ELMT_C , RSK_ALL.SRVC_G_C AS SRVC_G_C , RSK_ALL.RSK_VALT_ITEM AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , CASE WHEN RSK.JIPYO_V IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE RSK.JIPYO_V END AS JIPYO_V , CASE WHEN RSK.JIPYO_V IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( RSK.JIPYO_V * SCORE.R2 / RSK_MAX.JIPYO_MAX , 2 ) END AS JIPYO_SCORE , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM ( SELECT BN.BRNO , M.RSK_ELMT_C , NVL(E.RA_ITEM_CODE,' ') AS SRVC_G_C, M.RSK_CTNT, M.RSK_VALT_ITEM, M.RSK_VALT_CAL_STD, M.EDD_YN, M.INDV_YN, M.CORP_YN, M.I_MODEL_YN, M.B_MODEL_YN, M.USE_YN FROM SRBA_RISK_ELMT_M M , SRBA_ETC_I E , SRBA_VALT_BRNO BN WHERE M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.BAS_YYMM = E.BAS_YYMM(+) AND M.RSK_ELMT_C = E.RSK_ELMT_C(+) AND M.RSK_CATG1_C != 'R3' AND M.USE_YN = '1' AND M.BAS_YYMM = BN.BAS_YYMM AND BN.BRNO NOT IN ( SELECT DTL_C AS BRNO FROM SRBA_DTL_C T1 WHERE GRP_C = 'R344' ) UNION ALL SELECT BN.BRNO , M.RSK_ELMT_C , ' ' AS SRVC_G_C, M.RSK_CTNT, M.RSK_VALT_ITEM, M.RSK_VALT_CAL_STD, M.EDD_YN, M.INDV_YN, M.CORP_YN, M.I_MODEL_YN, M.B_MODEL_YN, M.USE_YN FROM SRBA_RISK_ELMT_M M , SRBA_VALT_BRNO BN WHERE M.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND M.RSK_CATG1_C = 'R3' AND M.USE_YN = '1' AND M.BAS_YYMM = BN.BAS_YYMM AND BN.BRNO NOT IN ( SELECT DTL_C AS BRNO FROM SRBA_DTL_C T1 WHERE GRP_C = 'R344' ) ) RSK_ALL , ( SELECT * FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} ) RSK , ( SELECT BAS_YYMM, RSK_ELMT_C, SRVC_G_C, MAX(JIPYO_V) AS JIPYO_MAX FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND BRNO != '99999' GROUP BY BAS_YYMM, RSK_ELMT_C , SRVC_G_C ) RSK_MAX , ( SELECT M.RSK_ELMT_C , M.RSK_ELMT_C_NM , M.SRVC_G_C , M.RSK_VALT_ITEM , M.RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM , M.R1 , WT.RBA_FIN_WEIGHT , CASE WHEN WT.RBA_FIN_WEIGHT = 0 THEN ROUND(WTMAX.RBA_WEIGHT_MAX*M.RSK_PNT/(SELECT SUM(A.RSK_PNT) FROM SRBA_RISK_ELMT_M A , SRBA_RISK_WEIGHT_M B WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND A.BAS_YYMM = B.BAS_YYMM AND A.RSK_VALT_ITEM = B.RSK_VALT_ITEM AND B.RBA_FIN_WEIGHT = 0 ),2) ELSE ROUND( M.R1*WT.RBA_FIN_WEIGHT/100 , 2 ) END AS R2 FROM ( SELECT RSK_ELMT_C , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.RSK_ELMT_C AND GRP_C = 'S003' ) AS RSK_ELMT_C_NM , ' ' AS SRVC_G_C , A.RSK_VALT_ITEM , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.RSK_VALT_ITEM AND GRP_C = 'R342' ) AS RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM , A.RSK_PNT , (SELECT SUM(RSK_PNT) FROM SRBA_RISK_ELMT_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND RSK_CATG1_C != 'R5' AND RSK_VALT_ITEM = A.RSK_VALT_ITEM) AS PNT_SUM , B.RBA_FIN_WEIGHT , CASE WHEN B.RBA_FIN_WEIGHT = 0 THEN -1 ELSE ROUND( A.RSK_PNT*100 / (SELECT SUM(RSK_PNT) FROM SRBA_RISK_ELMT_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND RSK_VALT_ITEM = A.RSK_VALT_ITEM),2) END AS R1
FROM SRBA_RISK_ELMT_M A , SRBA_RISK_WEIGHT_M B WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND A.BAS_YYMM = B.BAS_YYMM AND A.RSK_VALT_ITEM = B.RSK_VALT_ITEM AND A.RSK_CATG1_C IN ( 'R1' ,'R2', 'R3', 'R4' )
UNION ALL
SELECT RSK_ELMT_C , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.RSK_ELMT_C AND GRP_C = 'S003' ) AS RSK_ELMT_C_NM , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS SRVC_G_C , A.RSK_VALT_ITEM , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.RSK_VALT_ITEM AND GRP_C = 'R342' ) AS RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM , A.RA_ITEM_SCR , (SELECT SUM(RA_ITEM_SCR) FROM SRBA_ETC_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND RSK_VALT_ITEM = A.RSK_VALT_ITEM) AS PNT_SUM , B.RBA_FIN_WEIGHT , CASE WHEN B.RBA_FIN_WEIGHT = 0 THEN -1 ELSE ROUND( A.RA_ITEM_SCR*100 / (SELECT SUM(RA_ITEM_SCR) FROM SRBA_ETC_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND RSK_VALT_ITEM = A.RSK_VALT_ITEM),2) END AS R1
FROM SRBA_ETC_I A , SRBA_RISK_WEIGHT_M B WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND A.BAS_YYMM = B.BAS_YYMM AND A.RSK_VALT_ITEM = B.RSK_VALT_ITEM AND A.RSK_ELMT_C LIKE 'R5%' ) M , ( SELECT AA.RSK_VALT_ITEM , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = AA.RSK_VALT_ITEM AND GRP_C = 'R342' ) AS RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM , CASE WHEN LENGTH(AA.CHG_DT) = 8 THEN ROUND(AA.RBA_FIN_WEIGHT*10*1000/BB.RBA_WEIGHT_TOT,2) WHEN AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV > RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP THEN ROUND(AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV*1000/BB.RBA_WEIGHT_TOT ,2) ELSE ROUND(AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP*1000/BB.RBA_WEIGHT_TOT ,2) END AS RBA_FIN_WEIGHT FROM SRBA_RISK_WEIGHT_M AA , ( SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN LENGTH(AA.CHG_DT) = 8 THEN ROUND(AA.RBA_FIN_WEIGHT*10,2) WHEN AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV > RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP THEN ROUND(AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV*1000/BB.RA_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT ,2) ELSE ROUND(AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP*1000/BB.RA_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT ,2) END) + 1000 AS RBA_WEIGHT_TOT FROM SRBA_RISK_WEIGHT_M AA , ( SELECT BAS_YYMM ,SUM(CASE WHEN RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV > RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP THEN RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV ELSE RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP END ) AS RA_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT FROM SRBA_RISK_WEIGHT_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} GROUP BY BAS_YYMM ) BB WHERE AA.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND AA.BAS_YYMM = BB.BAS_YYMM ) BB WHERE AA.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} ) WT , ( SELECT ROUND ( ( MAX(CASE WHEN LENGTH(AA.CHG_DT) = 8 THEN ROUND(AA.RBA_FIN_WEIGHT*10,2) WHEN AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV > RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP THEN ROUND(AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV*1000/BB.RA_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT ,2) ELSE ROUND(AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP*1000/BB.RA_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT ,2) END) ) * 1000 / ( MAX(CASE WHEN LENGTH(AA.CHG_DT) = 8 THEN ROUND(AA.RBA_FIN_WEIGHT*10,2) WHEN AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV > RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP THEN ROUND(AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV*1000/BB.RA_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT ,2) ELSE ROUND(AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP*1000/BB.RA_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT ,2) END) + 1000 ) , 2 ) AS RBA_WEIGHT_MAX FROM SRBA_RISK_WEIGHT_M AA , ( SELECT BAS_YYMM ,SUM(CASE WHEN RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV > RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP THEN RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV ELSE RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP END ) AS RA_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT FROM SRBA_RISK_WEIGHT_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} GROUP BY BAS_YYMM ) BB WHERE AA.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND AA.BAS_YYMM = BB.BAS_YYMM ) WTMAX WHERE M.RSK_VALT_ITEM = WT.RSK_VALT_ITEM(+) ) SCORE WHERE 1 = 1 AND RSK_ALL.RSK_ELMT_C = RSK.RSK_ELMT_C(+) AND RSK_ALL.SRVC_G_C = RSK.SRVC_G_C(+) AND RSK_ALL.BRNO = RSK.BRNO(+) AND RSK_ALL.RSK_ELMT_C = SCORE.RSK_ELMT_C(+) AND RSK_ALL.SRVC_G_C = SCORE.SRVC_G_C(+) AND RSK_ALL.RSK_ELMT_C = RSK_MAX.RSK_ELMT_C(+) AND RSK_ALL.SRVC_G_C = RSK_MAX.SRVC_G_C(+) ORDER BY RSK.BRNO, RSK.RSK_ELMT_C , RSK.SRVC_G_C

INSERT INTO SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE ( BAS_YYMM , BRNO , RSK_CATG1_C , RSK_ELMT_C , SRVC_G_C , RSK_VALT_ITEM , JIPYO_V , JIPYO_SCORE , DR_DT , DR_TIME ) SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM , '99999' AS BRNO , RSK_CATG1_C , RSK_ELMT_C , SRVC_G_C , RSK_VALT_ITEM , ROUND( AVG( NVL(JIPYO_V ,0) ) , 2 ) JIPYO_V , ROUND( AVG( NVL(JIPYO_SCORE,0) ) , 2 ) JIPYO_SCORE , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND BRNO != '99999' GROUP BY RSK_CATG1_C , RSK_ELMT_C , SRVC_G_C , RSK_VALT_ITEM

INSERT INTO KRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M ( BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,BRNO,RSK_INDCT,INDV_CORP_CCD,SRVC_G_C,RSK_CATG,RSK_EVT,RSK_LVL_C,JIPYO_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME )
WITH TEMP_M1 AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALIZE FULL(M) FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ M.RNMCNO ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,VALT_BRNO ,SRVC_G_C ,SUM(DL_AMT) DL_AMT FROM KRBA_TRN_I M, KRBA_CUST_I A WHERE 1=1 AND M.RNMCNO = A.RNMCNO AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND A.VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND M.DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND M.DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND M.BNCC_TRN_YN = 'N' GROUP BY VALT_BRNO ,SRVC_G_C ,M.RNMCNO ,INDV_CORP_CCD ), TEMP_M2 AS( SELECT /*+ MATERIALIZE */ M.BAS_YYYY ,M.RSK_INDCT ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_FAC ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C ,RSK_INDCT_NO ,RSK_INDCT_NM ,SRVC_G_C FROM KRBA_RSK_INDCT_M M, KRBA_RSK_INDICT_D A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYYY = A.BAS_YYYY AND M.RSK_INDCT = A.RSK_INDCT AND USYN = 1 AND M.BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND M.RSK_CATG = '2' ), TEMP_A1 AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALIZE FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ * FROM KRBA_CUST_T A WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND RSK_CATG = '2' )
SELECT /*+ MATERIALIZE FULL(M) FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ A.BAS_YYYY ,A.VALT_TRN ,VALT_BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,A.SRVC_G_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C ,NVL(SUM(DL_AMT), 0) AS AMT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM TEMP_M1 M ,( SELECT /*+ MATERIALIZE FULL(M) FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ M.BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,M.RSK_INDCT ,M.RSK_CATG ,M.RSK_FAC ,M.RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C ,RSK_INDCT_NO ,RSK_INDCT_NM ,SRVC_G_C ,RNMCNO ,COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY 1) FROM TEMP_M2 M ,TEMP_A1 A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYYY = A.BAS_YYYY AND M.RSK_CATG = A.RSK_CATG AND M.RSK_FAC = A.RSK_FAC AND M.RSK_EVT = A.RSK_EVT ) A WHERE 1=1 AND M.RNMCNO = A.RNMCNO AND M.SRVC_G_C = A.SRVC_G_C GROUP BY A.BAS_YYYY ,A.VALT_TRN ,VALT_BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,A.SRVC_G_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C

INSERT INTO KRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M ( BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,BRNO,RSK_INDCT,INDV_CORP_CCD,SRVC_G_C,RSK_CATG,RSK_EVT,RSK_LVL_C,JIPYO_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME ) WITH TEMP_0X AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALIZE */ M.BAS_YYYY ,M.RSK_INDCT ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_FAC ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C ,RSK_INDCT_NO ,SRVC_G_C ,RSK_INDCT_NM FROM ssq.KRBA_RSK_INDCT_M M, ssq.KRBA_RSK_INDICT_D A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYYY = A.BAS_YYYY AND M.RSK_INDCT = A.RSK_INDCT AND USYN = 1 AND M.BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND M.RSK_CATG = '4' AND RSK_FAC = '01' ) SELECT /*채널-객장*/ A.BAS_YYYY ,A.VALT_TRN ,VALT_BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,TOX_01.SRVC_G_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C ,NVL(SUM(DL_AMT), 0) AS AMT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM TEMP_0X TOX_01 , ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(C) FULL(M) PARALLEL(M 4) */ #{basYymm} BAS_YYYY ,#{valtTrn} VALT_TRN ,VALT_BRNO ,M.SRVC_G_C ,NVL(C.INDV_CORP_CCD, 1) AS INDV_CORP_CCD ,SUM(DL_AMT) DL_AMT FROM KRBA_TRN_I M , KRBA_CUST_I C WHERE 1=1 AND M.CHNL_CLSN_CODE = 'C01' AND C.RNMCNO = M.RNMCNO AND C.BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND C.VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND M.DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND M.DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND M.BNCC_TRN_YN = 'N' --방카슈랑스 제외 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TEMP_0X TOX_01 WHERE TOX_01.RSK_EVT = '01' AND TOX_01.SRVC_G_C = M.SRVC_G_C) GROUP BY VALT_BRNO ,M.SRVC_G_C ,NVL(C.INDV_CORP_CCD, 1) ) A WHERE 1=1 AND TOX_01.RSK_EVT = '01' /*채널-객장*/ AND TOX_01.SRVC_G_C = A.SRVC_G_C GROUP BY A.BAS_YYYY ,A.VALT_TRN ,VALT_BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,TOX_01.SRVC_G_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C
UNION ALL
SELECT /*채널-ODS*/ A.BAS_YYYY ,A.VALT_TRN ,VALT_BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,TOX_02.SRVC_G_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C ,NVL(SUM(DL_AMT), 0) AS AMT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM TEMP_0X TOX_02 , ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(C) FULL(M) PARALLEL(M 4) */ #{basYymm} BAS_YYYY ,#{valtTrn} VALT_TRN ,VALT_BRNO ,M.SRVC_G_C ,NVL(C.INDV_CORP_CCD, 1) AS INDV_CORP_CCD ,SUM(DL_AMT) DL_AMT FROM KRBA_TRN_I M , KRBA_CUST_I C WHERE 1=1 AND M.CHNL_CLSN_CODE = 'C12' AND C.RNMCNO = M.RNMCNO AND C.BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND C.VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND M.DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND M.DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND M.BNCC_TRN_YN = 'N' --방카슈랑스 제외 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TEMP_0X TOX_02 WHERE TOX_02.RSK_EVT = '02' AND TOX_02.SRVC_G_C = M.SRVC_G_C) GROUP BY VALT_BRNO ,M.SRVC_G_C ,NVL(C.INDV_CORP_CCD, 1) ) A WHERE 1=1 AND TOX_02.RSK_EVT = '02' /*채널-ODS*/ AND TOX_02.SRVC_G_C = A.SRVC_G_C GROUP BY A.BAS_YYYY ,A.VALT_TRN ,VALT_BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,TOX_02.SRVC_G_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C
UNION ALL
SELECT /*채널-자동화기기*/ A.BAS_YYYY ,A.VALT_TRN ,VALT_BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,TOX_03.SRVC_G_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C ,NVL(SUM(DL_AMT), 0) AS AMT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM TEMP_0X TOX_03 , ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(C) FULL(M) PARALLEL(M 4) */ #{basYymm} BAS_YYYY ,#{valtTrn} VALT_TRN ,VALT_BRNO ,M.SRVC_G_C ,NVL(C.INDV_CORP_CCD, 1) AS INDV_CORP_CCD ,SUM(DL_AMT) DL_AMT FROM KRBA_TRN_I M , KRBA_CUST_I C WHERE 1=1 AND M.CHNL_CLSN_CODE = 'C13' AND C.RNMCNO = M.RNMCNO AND C.BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND C.VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND M.DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND M.DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND M.BNCC_TRN_YN = 'N' --방카슈랑스 제외 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TEMP_0X TOX_03 WHERE TOX_03.RSK_EVT = '03' AND TOX_03.SRVC_G_C = M.SRVC_G_C) GROUP BY VALT_BRNO ,M.SRVC_G_C ,NVL(C.INDV_CORP_CCD, 1) ) A WHERE 1=1 AND TOX_03.RSK_EVT = '03' /*채널-자동화기기*/ AND TOX_03.SRVC_G_C = A.SRVC_G_C GROUP BY A.BAS_YYYY ,A.VALT_TRN ,VALT_BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,TOX_03.SRVC_G_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C
UNION ALL
SELECT /*채널-HTS/MTS/WTS/ARS*/ A.BAS_YYYY ,A.VALT_TRN ,VALT_BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,TOX_04.SRVC_G_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C ,NVL(SUM(DL_AMT), 0) AS AMT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM TEMP_0X TOX_04 , ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(C) FULL(M) PARALLEL(M 4) */ #{basYymm} BAS_YYYY ,#{valtTrn} VALT_TRN ,VALT_BRNO ,M.SRVC_G_C ,NVL(C.INDV_CORP_CCD, 1) AS INDV_CORP_CCD ,SUM(DL_AMT) DL_AMT FROM KRBA_TRN_I M , KRBA_CUST_I C WHERE 1=1 AND M.CHNL_CLSN_CODE IN ('C07' ,'C08' ,'C09' ,'C05') AND C.RNMCNO = M.RNMCNO AND C.BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND C.VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND M.DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND M.DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND M.BNCC_TRN_YN = 'N' --방카슈랑스 제외 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TEMP_0X TOX_04 WHERE TOX_04.RSK_EVT = '04' AND TOX_04.SRVC_G_C = M.SRVC_G_C) GROUP BY VALT_BRNO ,M.SRVC_G_C ,NVL(C.INDV_CORP_CCD, 1) ) A WHERE 1=1 AND TOX_04.RSK_EVT = '04' /*채널-HTS/MTS/WTS/ARS*/ AND TOX_04.SRVC_G_C = A.SRVC_G_C GROUP BY A.BAS_YYYY ,A.VALT_TRN ,VALT_BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,TOX_04.SRVC_G_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C
UNION ALL
SELECT /*채널-콜센터*/ A.BAS_YYYY ,A.VALT_TRN ,VALT_BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,TOX_05.SRVC_G_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C ,NVL(SUM(DL_AMT), 0) AS AMT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM TEMP_0X TOX_05 , ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(C) FULL(M) PARALLEL(M 4) */ #{basYymm} BAS_YYYY ,#{valtTrn} VALT_TRN ,VALT_BRNO ,M.SRVC_G_C ,NVL(C.INDV_CORP_CCD, 1) AS INDV_CORP_CCD ,SUM(DL_AMT) DL_AMT FROM KRBA_TRN_I M , KRBA_CUST_I C WHERE 1=1 AND M.CHNL_CLSN_CODE = 'C04' AND C.RNMCNO = M.RNMCNO AND C.BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND C.VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND M.DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND M.DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND M.BNCC_TRN_YN = 'N' --방카슈랑스 제외 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TEMP_0X TOX_05 WHERE TOX_05.RSK_EVT = '05' AND TOX_05.SRVC_G_C = M.SRVC_G_C) GROUP BY VALT_BRNO ,M.SRVC_G_C ,NVL(C.INDV_CORP_CCD, 1) ) A WHERE 1=1 AND TOX_05.RSK_EVT = '05' /*채널-콜센터*/ AND TOX_05.SRVC_G_C = A.SRVC_G_C GROUP BY A.BAS_YYYY ,A.VALT_TRN ,VALT_BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,TOX_05.SRVC_G_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C

INSERT INTO KRBA_EXPS_EXTR_T1 (BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,BRNO,RSK_CATG,SRVC_G_C,CAL_JIPYO_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME) SELECT BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,RSK_CATG ,SRVC_G_C ,SUM(AMT) AMT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM ( SELECT /*LEVEL 가중치 적용*/ BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,RSK_CATG ,SRVC_G_C ,( CASE WHEN RSK_LVL_C = '1' THEN ROUND(AMT * (SELECT MDL_WGT_DTL_V / 100 FROM KRBA_VALT_MD_D WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '1.1' AND MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '1.1.5')) WHEN RSK_LVL_C = '2' THEN ROUND(AMT * (SELECT MDL_WGT_DTL_V / 100 FROM KRBA_VALT_MD_D WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '1.1' AND MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '1.1.4')) ELSE ROUND(AMT * (SELECT MDL_WGT_DTL_V / 100 FROM KRBA_VALT_MD_D WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '1.1' AND MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '1.1.3')) END ) AMT
FROM ( SELECT /*LEVEL 합산*/ BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,SRVC_G_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_LVL_C ,SUM(AMT) AMT ,COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY 1) TOTAL FROM ( SELECT /*이벤트별 합산*/ BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,SRVC_G_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C ,SUM(AMT) AMT ,COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY 1) TOTAL FROM ( SELECT /*INDICATOR별 합계*/ BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,SRVC_G_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C ,SUM(AMT) AMT ,COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY 1) TOTAL FROM ( SELECT /*가중치 적용*/ BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,SRVC_G_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,( CASE WHEN INDV_CORP_CCD = '1' THEN ROUND(JIPYO_V * (SELECT MDL_WGT_DTL_V / 100 FROM KRBA_VALT_MD_D WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '1.1' AND MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '1.1.1')) ELSE ROUND(JIPYO_V * (SELECT MDL_WGT_DTL_V / 100 FROM KRBA_VALT_MD_D WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '1.1' AND MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '1.1.2')) END ) AMT FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,SRVC_G_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C ,JIPYO_V ,COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY 1) TOTAL FROM KRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND UNFY_YN = '0' ) M ) M GROUP BY BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,SRVC_G_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C ) M GROUP BY BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,SRVC_G_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C ) M GROUP BY BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,SRVC_G_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_LVL_C ) M ) M GROUP BY BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,RSK_CATG ,SRVC_G_C ORDER BY BRNO ,RSK_CATG ,SRVC_G_C

INSERT INTO KRBA_EXPS_LST_I (BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,BRNO,SRVC_G_C,STD_SCOR,EXPS_SCOR,LST_TOT_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME) WITH BAS_V AS( SELECT SRVC_G_C ,ROUND(AVG(LST_TOT_V),3) AVG_V --평균 ,ROUND(STDDEV(LST_TOT_V),1) STDDEV_V --표준편자 FROM ( SELECT BRNO,SRVC_G_C ,SUM(CAL_JIPYO_V) LST_TOT_V FROM KRBA_EXPS_EXTR_T1 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} GROUP BY SRVC_G_C, BRNO ) GROUP BY SRVC_G_C ORDER BY SRVC_G_C ) SELECT BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,SRVC_G_C ,ROUND(STD_SCOR, 4) STD_SCOR ,ROUND(STD_SCOR * 10, 7) EXPS_SCOR ,LST_TOT_V ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,SRVC_G_C ,STD_V ,( CASE WHEN STD_V < 0 THEN 0.5 - (SELECT STD_RGLR_DST_V FROM KRBA_STD_PSIT_I WHERE Z_V = ABS(STD_V)) WHEN STD_V >= 0 AND STD_V <= 7 THEN 0.5 + (SELECT STD_RGLR_DST_V FROM KRBA_STD_PSIT_I WHERE Z_V = STD_V) WHEN STD_V > 7 THEN 1 WHEN LST_TOT_V = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ) STD_SCOR ,LST_TOT_V FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYYY ,A.VALT_TRN ,A.BRNO ,A.SRVC_G_C ,A.LST_TOT_V ,ROUND((A.LST_TOT_V - B.AVG_V) / DECODE(B.STDDEV_V,0,1,B.STDDEV_V),3) STD_V --표준화값 ,B.AVG_V ,B.STDDEV_V ,COUNT(A.SRVC_G_C) OVER(PARTITION BY 1) SRVC_G_C_CNT FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,SRVC_G_C ,SUM(CAL_JIPYO_V) LST_TOT_V ,COUNT(SRVC_G_C) OVER(PARTITION BY SRVC_G_C) SRVC_G_C_CNT FROM KRBA_EXPS_EXTR_T1 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} GROUP BY BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,SRVC_G_C ORDER BY SRVC_G_C ) A, BAS_V B WHERE 1=1 AND A.SRVC_G_C = B.SRVC_G_C ) M ) M ORDER BY BRNO ,SRVC_G_C
mapper.select: SELECT #{basYymm} basYymm ,#{valtTrn} valtTrn ,DPRT_CD AS BASE_ORG_NO ,TRNS_DPRT_CODE AS FAC_ORG_NO --폐쇄점포를 흡수한점포 FROM NIC41B WHERE 1=1 AND DPRT_CD IN ( SELECT DISTINCT BRNO FROM KRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} ) AND USE_CCD = 'N'
SELECT TRNS_DPRT_CODE AS FAC_ORG_NO --폐쇄점포를 흡수한점포 FROM NIC41B WHERE 1=1 AND DPRT_CD = #{baseOrgNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO KRBA_EXPS_EXTR_T (BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,SRVC_G_C, RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C ,JIPYO_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME) SELECT BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,#{facOrgNo} BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,SRVC_G_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C ,SUM(JIPYO_V) JIPYO_V ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,SRVC_G_C, RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C ,JIPYO_V FROM KRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND BRNO = #{baseOrgNo} UNION ALL SELECT BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,SRVC_G_C, RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C ,JIPYO_V FROM KRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND BRNO = #{facOrgNo} ) GROUP BY BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,RSK_INDCT ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,SRVC_G_C ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C

INSERT INTO KRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M (BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,SRVC_G_C, RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C ,JIPYO_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME) SELECT BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,SRVC_G_C, RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C ,SUM(JIPYO_V) ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM KRBA_EXPS_EXTR_T WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} GROUP BY BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,SRVC_G_C, RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C

INSERT INTO KRBA_EXPS_SCOR_I ( BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,BRNO,STD_SCOR,EXPS_SCOR,EXPS_AMT,DR_DT,DR_TIME ) WITH BAS_V AS( SELECT ROUND(AVG(LST_TOT_V),3) AVG_V --평균 ,ROUND(STDDEV(LST_TOT_V),1) STDDEV_V --표준편자 FROM ( SELECT BRNO ,SUM(LST_TOT_V) LST_TOT_V FROM KRBA_EXPS_LST_I WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} GROUP BY BRNO ) ) SELECT BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,STD_SCOR ,ROUND(STD_SCOR * 10, 7) EXPS_SCOR ,LST_TOT_V ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,STD_V ,( CASE WHEN STD_V < 0 THEN 0.5 - (SELECT STD_RGLR_DST_V FROM KRBA_STD_PSIT_I WHERE Z_V = ABS(STD_V)) WHEN STD_V >= 0 AND STD_V <= 7 THEN 0.5 + (SELECT STD_RGLR_DST_V FROM KRBA_STD_PSIT_I WHERE Z_V = STD_V) WHEN STD_V > 7 THEN 1 WHEN LST_TOT_V = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ) STD_SCOR ,LST_TOT_V FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYYY ,A.VALT_TRN ,A.BRNO ,A.LST_TOT_V ,ROUND((A.LST_TOT_V - B.AVG_V) / B.STDDEV_V,3) STD_V --표준화값 ,B.AVG_V ,B.STDDEV_V ,COUNT(BRNO) OVER(PARTITION BY 1) BRNO_CNT FROM (
SELECT BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,SUM(LST_TOT_V) LST_TOT_V ,COUNT(BRNO) OVER(PARTITION BY 1) BRNO_CNT FROM KRBA_EXPS_LST_I WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} GROUP BY BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ) A, BAS_V B ) M ) M ORDER BY BRNO

INSERT INTO KRBA_BZRSK_EXTR_M ( BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,BRNO,RSK_INDCT,RSK_CATG,RSK_EVT,JIPYO_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME ) SELECT BAS_YYYY ,#{valtTrn} VALT_TRN ,VALT_BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,CNT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER()OVER(PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY RSK_INDCT ) RNUM ,BAS_YYYY ,RSK_INDCT ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_FAC ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_INDCT_NO ,RSK_INDCT_NM FROM KRBA_RSK_INDCT_M WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND RSK_CATG = '5' AND EXTR_TGT_YN = '1' ) M ,( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ 1 RN ,VALT_BRNO ,COUNT(RNMCNO) CNT --마약연루국 고객수 FROM( SELECT DISTINCT VALT_BRNO ,RNMCNO FROM KRBA_TRN_I A WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdtYymm} AND #{tgtTrnEdtYymm} AND DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND RNMCNO IN ( SELECT RNMCNO FROM KRBA_NAT_T WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND RSK_EVT = '01' ) ) GROUP BY VALT_BRNO UNION ALL SELECT 2 RN ,VALT_BRNO ,COUNT(RNMCNO) CNT --자금세탁의심국 고객수 FROM( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT VALT_BRNO ,RNMCNO FROM KRBA_TRN_I A WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdtYymm} AND #{tgtTrnEdtYymm} AND DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND RNMCNO IN ( SELECT RNMCNO FROM KRBA_NAT_T WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND RSK_EVT = '02' ) ) GROUP BY VALT_BRNO UNION ALL SELECT 3 RN ,VALT_BRNO ,COUNT(RNMCNO) CNT --조세피난처 고객수 FROM( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT VALT_BRNO ,RNMCNO FROM KRBA_TRN_I A WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdtYymm} AND #{tgtTrnEdtYymm} AND DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND RNMCNO IN ( SELECT RNMCNO FROM KRBA_NAT_T WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND RSK_EVT = '04' ) ) GROUP BY VALT_BRNO UNION ALL SELECT 4 RN ,VALT_BRNO ,COUNT(RNMCNO) CNT --UN 제재국가 고객수 FROM( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT VALT_BRNO ,RNMCNO FROM KRBA_TRN_I A WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdtYymm} AND #{tgtTrnEdtYymm} AND DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND RNMCNO IN ( SELECT RNMCNO FROM KRBA_NAT_T WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND RSK_EVT = '05' ) ) GROUP BY VALT_BRNO UNION ALL SELECT 5 RN ,VALT_BRNO ,COUNT(RNMCNO) CNT --고액자산가 고객수 FROM( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT VALT_BRNO ,RNMCNO FROM KRBA_TRN_I A WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdtYymm} AND #{tgtTrnEdtYymm} AND DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND RNMCNO IN ( SELECT RNMCNO FROM KRBA_CUST_T WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND RSK_FAC = '02' AND RSK_EVT = '01' ) ) GROUP BY VALT_BRNO UNION ALL SELECT 6 RN ,VALT_BRNO ,COUNT(RNMCNO) CNT --사행성업종 고객수 FROM( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT VALT_BRNO ,RNMCNO FROM KRBA_TRN_I A WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdtYymm} AND #{tgtTrnEdtYymm} AND DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND RNMCNO IN ( SELECT RNMCNO FROM KRBA_CUST_T WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND RSK_FAC = '03' AND RSK_EVT = '01' ) ) GROUP BY VALT_BRNO UNION ALL SELECT 7 RN ,VALT_BRNO ,COUNT(RNMCNO) CNT --환전상 고객수 FROM( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT VALT_BRNO ,RNMCNO FROM KRBA_TRN_I A WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdtYymm} AND #{tgtTrnEdtYymm} AND DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND RNMCNO IN ( SELECT RNMCNO FROM KRBA_CUST_T WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND RSK_FAC = '03' AND RSK_EVT = '02' ) ) GROUP BY VALT_BRNO UNION ALL SELECT 8 RN ,VALT_BRNO ,COUNT(RNMCNO) CNT --대부업자 고객수 FROM( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT VALT_BRNO ,RNMCNO FROM KRBA_TRN_I A WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdtYymm} AND #{tgtTrnEdtYymm} AND DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND RNMCNO IN ( SELECT RNMCNO FROM KRBA_CUST_T WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND RSK_FAC = '03' AND RSK_EVT = '03' ) ) GROUP BY VALT_BRNO UNION ALL SELECT 9 RN ,VALT_BRNO ,COUNT(RNMCNO) CNT --귀금속등 현금집중사업 고객수 FROM( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT VALT_BRNO ,RNMCNO FROM KRBA_TRN_I A WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdtYymm} AND #{tgtTrnEdtYymm} AND DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND RNMCNO IN ( SELECT RNMCNO FROM KRBA_CUST_T WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND RSK_FAC = '03' AND RSK_EVT = '04' ) ) GROUP BY VALT_BRNO UNION ALL SELECT 10 RN ,VALT_BRNO ,COUNT(RNMCNO) CNT --전문서비스업 고객수 FROM( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT VALT_BRNO ,RNMCNO FROM KRBA_TRN_I A WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdtYymm} AND #{tgtTrnEdtYymm} AND DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND RNMCNO IN ( SELECT RNMCNO FROM KRBA_CUST_T WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND RSK_FAC = '03' AND RSK_EVT = '05' ) ) GROUP BY VALT_BRNO UNION ALL SELECT 11 RN ,VALT_BRNO ,COUNT(RNMCNO) CNT --가상화폐업 고객수 FROM( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT VALT_BRNO ,RNMCNO FROM KRBA_TRN_I A WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdtYymm} AND #{tgtTrnEdtYymm} AND DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND RNMCNO IN ( SELECT RNMCNO FROM KRBA_CUST_T WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND RSK_FAC = '03' AND RSK_EVT = '10' ) ) GROUP BY VALT_BRNO UNION ALL SELECT 12 RN ,VALT_BRNO ,COUNT(RNMCNO) CNT --PEP 고객수 FROM( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT VALT_BRNO ,RNMCNO FROM KRBA_TRN_I A WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdtYymm} AND #{tgtTrnEdtYymm} AND DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND RNMCNO IN ( SELECT RNMCNO FROM KRBA_CUST_T WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND RSK_FAC = '04' AND RSK_EVT = '01' ) ) GROUP BY VALT_BRNO UNION ALL SELECT 13 RN ,VALT_BRNO ,COUNT(RNMCNO) CNT --미성년자/고령자 고객수 FROM( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT VALT_BRNO ,RNMCNO FROM KRBA_TRN_I A WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdtYymm} AND #{tgtTrnEdtYymm} AND DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND RNMCNO IN ( SELECT RNMCNO FROM KRBA_CUST_T WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND RSK_FAC = '04' AND RSK_EVT = '03' ) ) GROUP BY VALT_BRNO UNION ALL SELECT 14 RN ,VALT_BRNO ,COUNT(RNMCNO) CNT --무직자 고객수 FROM( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT VALT_BRNO ,RNMCNO FROM KRBA_TRN_I A WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdtYymm} AND #{tgtTrnEdtYymm} AND DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND RNMCNO IN ( SELECT RNMCNO FROM KRBA_CUST_T WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND RSK_FAC = '04' AND RSK_EVT = '04' ) ) GROUP BY VALT_BRNO UNION ALL SELECT 15 RN ,VALT_BRNO ,COUNT(RNMCNO) CNT --신설법인 고객수 FROM( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT VALT_BRNO ,RNMCNO FROM KRBA_TRN_I A WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdtYymm} AND #{tgtTrnEdtYymm} AND DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND RNMCNO IN ( SELECT RNMCNO FROM KRBA_CUST_T WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND RSK_FAC = '05' AND RSK_EVT = '01' ) ) GROUP BY VALT_BRNO UNION ALL SELECT 16 RN ,VALT_BRNO ,COUNT(RNMCNO) CNT --비영리단체 고객수 FROM( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT VALT_BRNO ,RNMCNO FROM KRBA_TRN_I A WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdtYymm} AND #{tgtTrnEdtYymm} AND DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND RNMCNO IN ( SELECT RNMCNO FROM KRBA_CUST_T WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND RSK_FAC = '05' AND RSK_EVT = '06' ) ) GROUP BY VALT_BRNO
) A WHERE 1=1 AND M.RNUM = A.RN

INSERT INTO KRBA_BZRSK_EXTR_M ( BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,BRNO,RSK_INDCT,RSK_CATG,RSK_EVT,JIPYO_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME ) SELECT BAS_YYYY ,#{valtTrn} VALT_TRN ,VALT_BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,CNT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER()OVER(PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY RSK_INDCT ) RNUM ,BAS_YYYY ,RSK_INDCT ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_FAC ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_INDCT_NO ,RSK_INDCT_NM FROM KRBA_RSK_INDCT_M WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND RSK_CATG = '5' AND EXTR_TGT_YN = '1' ) M ,( SELECT /*+ FULL(M) PARALLEL(4) */ (CASE WHEN SRVC_G_C = '01' THEN 17 WHEN SRVC_G_C = '11' THEN 18 WHEN SRVC_G_C = '12' THEN 19 WHEN SRVC_G_C = '13' THEN 20 WHEN SRVC_G_C = '15' THEN 21 WHEN SRVC_G_C = '16' THEN 22 WHEN SRVC_G_C = '18' THEN 23 WHEN SRVC_G_C = '21' THEN 24 WHEN SRVC_G_C = '22' THEN 25 WHEN SRVC_G_C = '23' THEN 26 WHEN SRVC_G_C = '24' THEN 27 WHEN SRVC_G_C = '25' THEN 28 ELSE NULL END )RN ,VALT_BRNO ,COUNT(1) CNT FROM KRBA_TRN_I M WHERE 1=1 AND DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND SRVC_G_C IN ('01' ,'11' ,'12' ,'13' ,'15' ,'16' ,'18' ,'21' ,'22' ,'23' ,'24' ,'25') GROUP BY VALT_BRNO, SRVC_G_C ) A WHERE 1=1 AND M.RNUM = A.RN
mapper.select: SELECT #{basYymm} basYymm ,#{valtTrn} valtTrn ,DPRT_CD AS BASE_ORG_NO ,TRNS_DPRT_CODE AS FAC_ORG_NO --폐쇄점포를 흡수한점포 FROM NIC41B WHERE 1=1 AND DPRT_CD IN ( SELECT DISTINCT BRNO FROM KRBA_BZRSK_EXTR_M WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} ) AND USE_CCD = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO KRBA_BZRSK_EXTR_T ( BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,BRNO,RSK_INDCT,RSK_CATG,RSK_EVT,JIPYO_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME ) SELECT BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,#{facOrgNo} BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,SUM(JIPYO_V) JIPYO_V ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,JIPYO_V FROM KRBA_BZRSK_EXTR_M WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND BRNO = #{baseOrgNo} UNION ALL SELECT BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,JIPYO_V FROM KRBA_BZRSK_EXTR_M WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} AND BRNO = #{facOrgNo} ) GROUP BY BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,RSK_INDCT ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT

INSERT INTO KRBA_BZRSK_EXTR_M (BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,BRNO,RSK_INDCT,RSK_CATG,RSK_EVT,JIPYO_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME) SELECT BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,SUM(JIPYO_V) ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM KRBA_BZRSK_EXTR_T WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} GROUP BY BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT

INSERT INTO KRBA_BZRSK_EXTR_T1 ( BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,BRNO,RSK_INDCT,RSK_CATG,RSK_EVT,SCOR,DR_DT,DR_TIME ) WITH BAS_V AS( SELECT RSK_INDCT ,ROUND(AVG(JIPYO_V),3) AVG_V --평균 ,ROUND(STDDEV(JIPYO_V),1) STDDEV_V --표준편자 FROM ( SELECT BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,SUM(JIPYO_V) JIPYO_V FROM KRBA_BZRSK_EXTR_M WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} GROUP BY BRNO,RSK_INDCT ) GROUP BY RSK_INDCT ) SELECT BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,ROUND(STD_SCOR * 10, 7) EXPS_SCOR ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,STD_V ,( CASE WHEN STD_V < 0 THEN 0.5 - (SELECT STD_RGLR_DST_V FROM KRBA_STD_PSIT_I WHERE Z_V = ABS(STD_V)) WHEN STD_V >= 0 AND STD_V <= 7 THEN 0.5 + (SELECT STD_RGLR_DST_V FROM KRBA_STD_PSIT_I WHERE Z_V = STD_V) WHEN STD_V > 7 THEN 1 WHEN JIPYO_V = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 0 END ) STD_SCOR --정규분포 값 FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYYY ,A.VALT_TRN ,A.BRNO ,A.RSK_INDCT ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,JIPYO_V ,ROUND((A.JIPYO_V - B.AVG_V) / DECODE(B.STDDEV_V,0,1,B.STDDEV_V),3) STD_V --표준화값 ,B.AVG_V ,B.STDDEV_V ,COUNT(BRNO) OVER(PARTITION BY 1) BRNO_CNT FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,SUM(JIPYO_V) JIPYO_V ,COUNT(BRNO) OVER(PARTITION BY 1) BRNO_CNT FROM KRBA_BZRSK_EXTR_M WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} GROUP BY BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT
) A, BAS_V B WHERE A.RSK_INDCT = B.RSK_INDCT ) M ) M ORDER BY BRNO ,RSK_INDCT ,RSK_EVT

INSERT INTO KRBA_BZRSK_EXTR_T2 ( BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,BRNO,RSK_CATG,RSK_EVT,SCOR_AVG,DR_DT,DR_TIME ) SELECT BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_EVT ,ROUND(AVG(SCOR),6) SCOR ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM KRBA_BZRSK_EXTR_T1 WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} GROUP BY BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,BRNO,RSK_CATG,RSK_EVT ORDER BY BRNO,RSK_CATG,RSK_EVT

INSERT INTO KRBA_BZRSK_LST_I ( BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,BRNO,BSRSK_SCOR,BZRSK_GD,DR_DT,DR_TIME ) SELECT BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,BSRSK_SCOR ,(SELECT BZRSK_GD FROM KRBA_BZRSK_W_I WHERE MIN_SCOR <= BSRSK_SCOR AND MAX_SCOR > BSRSK_SCOR) BZRSK_GD ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,ROUND(AVG(SCOR_AVG),6) BSRSK_SCOR
FROM KRBA_BZRSK_EXTR_T2 WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} GROUP BY BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,BRNO ) M ORDER BY BRNO

INSERT INTO KRBA_MLTF_EXTR_I ( BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,BRNO,EXPS_SCOR,BZRSK_GD,MLTF_RSK_SCOR,DR_DT,DR_TIME ) SELECT BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,EXPS_SCOR ,BZRSK_GD ,ROUND((EXPS_SCOR * WEGHT) / 100,6) MLTF_RSK_SCOR ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,WT ,EXPS_SCOR ,NVL(BZRSK_GD,1) BZRSK_GD ,(SELECT WEGHT FROM KRBA_BZRSK_W_I WHERE BZRSK_GD = M.BZRSK_GD) WEGHT FROM ( SELECT M.BAS_YYYY ,M.VALT_TRN ,M.BRNO ,DECODE(M.BRNO,A.BRNO,1,0) WT ,EXPS_SCOR ,NVL(BZRSK_GD,1) BZRSK_GD FROM KRBA_EXPS_SCOR_I M, KRBA_BZRSK_LST_I A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYYY = A.BAS_YYYY(+) AND M.VALT_TRN = A.VALT_TRN(+) AND M.BRNO = A.BRNO(+) AND M.BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND M.VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} ) M )

INSERT INTO KRBA_BRNO_VALT_M ( BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,VALT_BRNO,TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID,TONGJE_ACT_ID,CH_ID,TONGJE_FLD_C,TONGJE_PROC_C,TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C,DR_DT,DR_TIME,DR_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT M.BAS_YYYY ,M.VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID ,TONGJE_ACT_ID ,CH_ID ,TONGJE_FLD_C ,TONGJE_PROC_C ,TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'),'SYSTEM' FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO FROM KRBA_MLTF_EXTR_I WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} ) M ,( SELECT M.BAS_YYYY ,TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID ,TONGJE_ACT_ID ,M.CH_ID ,TONGJE_FLD_C ,TONGJE_PROC_C ,TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C FROM KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_M M , KRBA_INTJ_CH_M A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYYY = A.BAS_YYYY AND M.CH_ID = A.CH_ID AND M.BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND OPR_VALT_BRNO = '99999' ) A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYYY = A.BAS_YYYY

INSERT INTO KRBA_BRNO_VALT_M ( BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,VALT_BRNO,TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID,TONGJE_ACT_ID,CH_ID,TONGJE_FLD_C,TONGJE_PROC_C,TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C,DR_DT,DR_TIME,DR_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT M.BAS_YYYY ,#{valtTrn} ,OPR_VALT_BRNO ,TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID ,TONGJE_ACT_ID ,M.CH_ID ,TONGJE_FLD_C ,TONGJE_PROC_C ,TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'),'SYSTEM' FROM KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_M M , KRBA_INTJ_CH_M A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYYY = A.BAS_YYYY AND M.CH_ID = A.CH_ID AND M.BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND OPR_VALT_BRNO != '99999'

INSERT INTO KRBA_BRNO_VALT_T ( BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,VALT_BRNO,TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID,SNO,DR_DT,DR_TIME,DR_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT M.BAS_YYYY ,M.VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID ,SNO ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'),'SYSTEM' FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO FROM KRBA_MLTF_EXTR_I WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND VALT_TRN = #{valtTrn} ) M ,( SELECT M.BAS_YYYY ,M.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID ,SNO FROM KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_M M , KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_T A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYYY = A.BAS_YYYY AND M.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AND M.BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND OPR_VALT_BRNO = '99999' ) A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYYY = A.BAS_YYYY

INSERT INTO KRBA_BRNO_VALT_T ( BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,VALT_BRNO,TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID,SNO,DR_DT,DR_TIME,DR_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT M.BAS_YYYY ,#{valtTrn} ,OPR_VALT_BRNO ,M.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID ,SNO ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'),'SYSTEM' FROM KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_M M , KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_T A WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYYY = A.BAS_YYYY AND M.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AND M.BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND OPR_VALT_BRNO != '99999'
mapper.select: SELECT M.BAS_YYYY ,M.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID FROM KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_M M WHERE 1=1 AND M.BAS_YYYY = #{basYymm} AND M.SMPL_YN = '1' AND M.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID NOT IN ('3.1.3_R1_C3_T1' ,'3.6.1_R1_C2_T1') ORDER BY M.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID
mapper.insert:
--3.1.1_R2_C4_T1 계약기반 거래 시의 CDD수행.xlsx --계약기반 거래 시의 CDD 수행 여부 --파일 1
INSERT INTO KRBA_BRNO_TMP_S_I ( BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,VALT_BRNO,TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID,SNO,DATA01,DATA02,DATA03,DATA04,DATA05,DATA06,DATA07,DATA08,DATA09,DATA10,DATA11,DATA12,DATA13,DATA14,DATA15,DATA16,DR_DT,DR_TIME,DR_OP_JKW_NO )
SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYYY ,#{valtTrn} AS VALT_TRN ,VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO ,'3.1.1_R2_C4_T1' AS TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY VALT_BRNO ORDER BY 1) AS SNO ,VALT_BRNO AS DATA01 ,DPRT_NM AS DATA02 ,ORIG_CLNT_NAME AS DATA03 -- 고객명 ,ORIG_ENNM AS DATA04 -- 영문명 ,ORIG_CNO AS DATA05 -- 실명번호 ,CDD_FLFL_DATE AS DATA06 -- CDD 등록일자 ,CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME AS DATA07 -- 등록 사유 ,TGT_CLNT_NAME AS DATA08 -- 대리인명 ,TGT_ENNM AS DATA09 -- 대리인 영문명 ,TGT_CNO AS DATA10 -- 대리인 실명번호 ,TGT_CDD_DATE AS DATA11 -- 대리인 CDD일자 ,'' DATA12 ,'' DATA13 ,'' DATA14 ,'' DATA15 ,'' DATA16 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'),'SYSTEM' FROM (
SELECT CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID RNMCNO ,VALT_BRNO -- 부점코드 ,(SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = VALT_BRNO) DPRT_NM --부점명 ,ORIG_CLNT_NAME -- 고객명 ,ORIG_ENNM -- 영문명 ,ORIG_CNO -- 실명번호 ,O_CDD_FLFL_DATE AS CDD_FLFL_DATE -- CDD 등록일자 ,CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TAGT_CLNT_NAME ELSE NULL END) TGT_CLNT_NAME -- 대리인명 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TAGT_ENNM ELSE NULL END) TGT_ENNM -- 대리인 영문명 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TGT_CNO ELSE NULL END) TGT_CNO -- 대리인 실명번호 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN CDD_FLFL_DATE ELSE NULL END) TGT_CDD_DATE -- 대리인 CDD일자 ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY VALT_BRNO ORDER BY 1) RNUM FROM ( SELECT RGBR_CODE AS VALT_BRNO --등록지점 ,CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID ,CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE -- 01 본인 ,02 대리인 03 의뢰인 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '01' THEN '본인' WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN '대리인' ELSE '의뢰인' END) CDD_TAGT_SECT_NM ,CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE -- 고객구분 1 개인 ,2 영리법인 ,3 비영리 법인 ,TAGT_CLNT_NAME --고객명 ,ORIG_CLNT_NAME -- 원천 고객명 ,CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID -- 원천 고객번호 ,TAGT_ENNM --고객영문명 ,ORIG_ENNM --원천영문명 ,CDD_TAGT_CLNT_NO_CRYP TGT_CNO -- 대상 실명번호 ,CDD_ORIG_CLNT_NO_CRYP ORIG_CNO -- 원천 실명번호 ,CDD_FLFL_DATE -- CDD 등록일자 ,(SELECT CDD_FLFL_DATE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD WHERE CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID) O_CDD_FLFL_DATE -- 원천 CDD 등록일자 ,CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE -- CDD 등록코드 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '01' THEN '계좌개설및폐쇄' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '02' THEN '고객주요정보변경' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '03' THEN '약정및청약' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '04' THEN '계약기반거래' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '05' THEN '일회성금융거래(무통장송금)' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '06' THEN '퇴직연금' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '07' THEN '방카슈랑스' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '98' THEN '자금세탁우려' ELSE CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME END ) CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME -- CDD 등록사유명 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD C WHERE 1=1 AND C.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE = 'A01' AND C.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '04' --계약기반거래 AND C.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' --CDD완료여부 AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE < #{tgtTrnEdt} ) AA ) T WHERE 1=1 AND RNUM <= 3

--3.1.1_R2_C5_T1 계약기반 거래에 대한 고객확인의무 검증 수행.xlsx --계약기반 거래에 대한 고객확인의무 검증 수행 여부 => 3.1.1_R2_C4_T1와의 차이점 --파일 2
INSERT INTO KRBA_BRNO_TMP_S_I ( BAS_YYYY,VALT_TRN,VALT_BRNO,TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID,SNO,DATA01,DATA02,DATA03,DATA04,DATA05,DATA06,DATA07,DATA08,DATA09,DATA10,DATA11,DATA12,DATA13,DATA14,DATA15,DATA16,DR_DT,DR_TIME,DR_OP_JKW_NO )
SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYYY ,#{valtTrn} AS VALT_TRN ,VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO ,'3.1.1_R2_C5_T1' AS TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY VALT_BRNO ORDER BY 1) AS SNO ,VALT_BRNO AS DATA01 ,DPRT_NM AS DATA02 ,ORIG_CLNT_NAME AS DATA03 -- 고객명 ,ORIG_ENNM AS DATA04 -- 영문명 ,ORIG_CNO AS DATA05 -- 실명번호 ,CDD_FLFL_DATE AS DATA06 -- CDD 등록일자 ,CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME AS DATA07 -- 등록 사유 ,TGT_CLNT_NAME AS DATA08 -- 대리인명 ,TGT_ENNM AS DATA09 -- 대리인 영문명 ,TGT_CNO AS DATA10 -- 대리인 실명번호 ,TGT_CDD_DATE AS DATA11 -- 대리인 CDD일자 ,'' DATA12 ,'' DATA13 ,'' DATA14 ,'' DATA15 ,'' DATA16 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'),'SYSTEM' FROM ( SELECT CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID RNMCNO ,VALT_BRNO -- 부점코드 ,(SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = VALT_BRNO) DPRT_NM --부점명 ,ORIG_CLNT_NAME -- 고객명 ,ORIG_ENNM -- 영문명 ,ORIG_CNO -- 실명번호 ,O_CDD_FLFL_DATE AS CDD_FLFL_DATE -- CDD 등록일자 ,CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TAGT_CLNT_NAME ELSE NULL END) TGT_CLNT_NAME -- 대리인명 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TAGT_ENNM ELSE NULL END) TGT_ENNM -- 대리인 영문명 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TGT_CNO ELSE NULL END) TGT_CNO -- 대리인 실명번호 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN CDD_FLFL_DATE ELSE NULL END) TGT_CDD_DATE -- 대리인 CDD일자 ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY VALT_BRNO ORDER BY 1) RNUM FROM ( SELECT RGBR_CODE AS VALT_BRNO --등록지점 ,CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID ,CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE -- 01 본인 ,02 대리인 03 의뢰인 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '01' THEN '본인' WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN '대리인' ELSE '의뢰인' END) CDD_TAGT_SECT_NM ,CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE -- 고객구분 1 개인 ,2 영리법인 ,3 비영리 법인 ,TAGT_CLNT_NAME --고객명 ,ORIG_CLNT_NAME -- 원천 고객명 ,CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID -- 원천 고객번호 ,TAGT_ENNM --고객영문명 ,ORIG_ENNM --원천영문명 ,CDD_TAGT_CLNT_NO_CRYP TGT_CNO -- 대상 실명번호 ,CDD_ORIG_CLNT_NO_CRYP ORIG_CNO -- 원천 실명번호 ,CDD_FLFL_DATE -- CDD 등록일자 ,(SELECT CDD_FLFL_DATE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD WHERE CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID) O_CDD_FLFL_DATE -- 원천 CDD 등록일자 ,CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE -- CDD 등록코드 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '01' THEN '계좌개설및폐쇄' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '02' THEN '고객주요정보변경' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '03' THEN '약정및청약' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '04' THEN '계약기반거래' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '05' THEN '일회성금융거래(무통장송금)' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '06' THEN '퇴직연금' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '07' THEN '방카슈랑스' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '98' THEN '자금세탁우려' ELSE CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME END ) CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME -- CDD 등록사유명 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD C WHERE 1=1 AND C.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE = 'A01' AND C.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '04' --계약기반거래 AND C.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' --CDD완료여부 AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE < #{tgtTrnEdt} ) AA ) T WHERE 1=1 AND RNUM <= 3

SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYYY ,#{valtTrn} AS VALT_TRN ,VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO ,'3.1.2_R1_C1_T1' AS TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY VALT_BRNO ORDER BY 1) AS SNO ,VALT_BRNO AS DATA01 ,DPRT_NM AS DATA02 ,ORIG_CLNT_NAME AS DATA03 -- 고객명 ,ORIG_ENNM AS DATA04 -- 영문명 ,ORIG_CNO AS DATA05 -- 실명번호 ,CDD_FLFL_DATE AS DATA06 -- CDD 등록일자 ,CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME AS DATA07 -- 등록 사유 ,TGT_CLNT_NAME AS DATA08 -- 대리인명 ,TGT_ENNM AS DATA09 -- 대리인 영문명 ,TGT_CNO AS DATA10 -- 대리인 실명번호 ,TGT_CDD_DATE AS DATA11 -- 대리인 CDD일자 ,'' DATA12 ,'' DATA13 ,'' DATA14 ,'' DATA15 ,'' DATA16 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'),'SYSTEM' FROM ( SELECT CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID RNMCNO ,VALT_BRNO -- 부점코드 ,(SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = VALT_BRNO) DPRT_NM --부점명 ,ORIG_CLNT_NAME -- 고객명 ,ORIG_ENNM -- 영문명 ,ORIG_CNO -- 실명번호 ,O_CDD_FLFL_DATE AS CDD_FLFL_DATE -- CDD 등록일자 ,CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TAGT_CLNT_NAME ELSE NULL END) TGT_CLNT_NAME -- 대리인명 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TAGT_ENNM ELSE NULL END) TGT_ENNM -- 대리인 영문명 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TGT_CNO ELSE NULL END) TGT_CNO -- 대리인 실명번호 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN CDD_FLFL_DATE ELSE NULL END) TGT_CDD_DATE -- 대리인 CDD일자 ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY VALT_BRNO ORDER BY 1) RNUM FROM ( SELECT C.RGBR_CODE AS VALT_BRNO --등록지점 ,C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID ,C.CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE -- 01 본인 ,02 대리인 03 의뢰인 ,(CASE WHEN C.CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '01' THEN '본인' WHEN C.CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN '대리인' ELSE '의뢰인' END) CDD_TAGT_SECT_NM ,C.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE -- 고객구분 1 개인 ,2 영리법인 ,3 비영리 법인 ,C.TAGT_CLNT_NAME --고객명 ,C.ORIG_CLNT_NAME -- 원천 고객명 ,C.CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID -- 원천 고객번호 ,C.TAGT_ENNM --고객영문명 ,C.ORIG_ENNM --원천영문명 ,C.CDD_TAGT_CLNT_NO_CRYP TGT_CNO -- 대상 실명번호 ,C.CDD_ORIG_CLNT_NO_CRYP ORIG_CNO -- 원천 실명번호 ,C.CDD_FLFL_DATE -- CDD 등록일자 ,(SELECT CDD_FLFL_DATE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD WHERE CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID) O_CDD_FLFL_DATE -- 원천 CDD 등록일자 ,C.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE -- CDD 등록코드 ,(CASE WHEN C.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE <> '99' THEN NVL((SELECT CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL WHERE CMN_CODE_ID = '06757' AND DEL_YN='N' AND CMN_CDVL = C.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE), C.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE) ELSE '기타(' || TRIM(C.CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME) || ')' END ) CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME -- CDD 등록사유명 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD C , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD D WHERE 1=1 AND C.CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID = D.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND C.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE = 'A01' AND C.CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' --대리인 AND D.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' --1:개인 2:영리법인 3:비영리법인 AND C.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '01' --계좌개설및폐쇄 AND C.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' --CDD완료여부 AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE < #{tgtTrnEdt} ) AA ) T WHERE 1=1 AND RNUM <= 3

,ORIG_CLNT_NAME -- 고객명 ,ORIG_ENNM -- 영문명 ,ORIG_CNO -- 실명번호 ,O_CDD_FLFL_DATE AS CDD_FLFL_DATE -- CDD 등록일자 ,CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TAGT_CLNT_NAME ELSE NULL END) TGT_CLNT_NAME -- 대리인명 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TAGT_ENNM ELSE NULL END) TGT_ENNM -- 대리인 영문명 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TGT_CNO ELSE NULL END) TGT_CNO -- 대리인 실명번호 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN CDD_FLFL_DATE ELSE NULL END) TGT_CDD_DATE -- 대리인 CDD일자 ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY VALT_BRNO ORDER BY 1) RNUM FROM ( SELECT C.RGBR_CODE AS VALT_BRNO --등록지점 ,C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID ,C.CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE -- 01 본인 ,02 대리인 03 의뢰인 ,(CASE WHEN C.CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '01' THEN '본인' WHEN C.CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN '대리인' ELSE '의뢰인' END) CDD_TAGT_SECT_NM ,C.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE -- 고객구분 1 개인 ,2 영리법인 ,3 비영리 법인 ,C.TAGT_CLNT_NAME --고객명 ,C.ORIG_CLNT_NAME -- 원천 고객명 ,C.CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID -- 원천 고객번호 ,C.TAGT_ENNM --고객영문명 ,C.ORIG_ENNM --원천영문명 ,C.CDD_TAGT_CLNT_NO_CRYP TGT_CNO -- 대상 실명번호 ,C.CDD_ORIG_CLNT_NO_CRYP ORIG_CNO -- 원천 실명번호 ,C.CDD_FLFL_DATE -- CDD 등록일자 ,(SELECT CDD_FLFL_DATE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD WHERE CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID) O_CDD_FLFL_DATE -- 원천 CDD 등록일자 ,C.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE -- CDD 등록코드 ,(CASE WHEN C.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE <> '99' THEN NVL((SELECT CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL WHERE CMN_CODE_ID = '06757' AND DEL_YN='N' AND CMN_CDVL = C.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE), C.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE) ELSE '기타(' || TRIM(C.CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME) || ')' END ) CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME -- CDD 등록사유명 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD C , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD D WHERE 1=1 AND C.CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID = D.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND C.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE = 'A01' AND C.CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' --대리인 AND D.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2','3') --1:개인 2:영리법인 3:비영리법인 AND C.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '01' --계좌개설 AND C.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' --CDD완료여부 AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE < #{tgtTrnEdt} ) AA ) T WHERE 1=1 AND RNUM <= 3

TGT_CLNT_NAME -- 대리인명 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TAGT_ENNM ELSE NULL END) TGT_ENNM -- 대리인 영문명 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TGT_CNO ELSE NULL END) TGT_CNO -- 대리인 실명번호 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN CDD_FLFL_DATE ELSE NULL END) TGT_CDD_DATE -- 대리인 CDD일자 ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY VALT_BRNO ORDER BY 1) RNUM FROM ( SELECT RGBR_CODE AS VALT_BRNO --등록지점 ,CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID ,CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE -- 01 본인 ,02 대리인 03 의뢰인 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '01' THEN '본인' WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN '대리인' ELSE '의뢰인' END) CDD_TAGT_SECT_NM ,CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE -- 고객구분 1 개인 ,2 영리법인 ,3 비영리 법인 ,TAGT_CLNT_NAME --고객명 ,ORIG_CLNT_NAME -- 원천 고객명 ,CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID -- 원천 고객번호 ,TAGT_ENNM --고객영문명 ,ORIG_ENNM --원천영문명 ,CDD_TAGT_CLNT_NO_CRYP TGT_CNO -- 대상 실명번호 ,CDD_ORIG_CLNT_NO_CRYP ORIG_CNO -- 원천 실명번호 ,CDD_FLFL_DATE -- CDD 등록일자 ,(SELECT CDD_FLFL_DATE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD WHERE CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID) O_CDD_FLFL_DATE -- 원천 CDD 등록일자 ,CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE -- CDD 등록코드 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '01' THEN '계좌개설및폐쇄' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '02' THEN '고객주요정보변경' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '03' THEN '약정및청약' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '04' THEN '계약기반거래' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '05' THEN '일회성금융거래(무통장송금)' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '06' THEN '퇴직연금' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '07' THEN '방카슈랑스' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '98' THEN '자금세탁우려' ELSE CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME END ) CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME -- CDD 등록사유명 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD C WHERE 1=1 AND C.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE = 'A01' AND C.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1' ,'2' ,'3') AND C.RGBR_CODE = '21220' -- 연금전략팀 AND C.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' --CDD완료여부 AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE < #{tgtTrnEdt} ) AA ) T WHERE 1=1 AND RNUM <= 3

SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYYY ,#{valtTrn} AS VALT_TRN ,VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO ,'3.1.2_R1_C9_T1' AS TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY VALT_BRNO ORDER BY 1) AS SNO ,VALT_BRNO AS DATA01 ,DPRT_NM AS DATA02 ,ORIG_CLNT_NAME AS DATA03 -- 고객명 ,ORIG_ENNM AS DATA04 -- 영문명 ,ORIG_CNO AS DATA05 -- 실명번호 ,CDD_FLFL_DATE AS DATA06 -- CDD 등록일자 ,CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME AS DATA07 -- 등록 사유 ,TGT_CLNT_NAME AS DATA08 -- 대리인명 ,TGT_ENNM AS DATA09 -- 대리인 영문명 ,TGT_CNO AS DATA10 -- 대리인 실명번호 ,TGT_CDD_DATE AS DATA11 -- 대리인 CDD일자 ,'' DATA12 ,'' DATA13 ,'' DATA14 ,'' DATA15 ,'' DATA16 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'),'SYSTEM' FROM ( SELECT CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID RNMCNO ,VALT_BRNO -- 부점코드 ,(SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = VALT_BRNO) DPRT_NM --부점명 ,ORIG_CLNT_NAME -- 고객명 ,ORIG_ENNM -- 영문명 ,ORIG_CNO -- 실명번호 ,O_CDD_FLFL_DATE AS CDD_FLFL_DATE -- CDD 등록일자 ,CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TAGT_CLNT_NAME ELSE NULL END) TGT_CLNT_NAME -- 대리인명 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TAGT_ENNM ELSE NULL END) TGT_ENNM -- 대리인 영문명 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TGT_CNO ELSE NULL END) TGT_CNO -- 대리인 실명번호 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN CDD_FLFL_DATE ELSE NULL END) TGT_CDD_DATE -- 대리인 CDD일자 ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY VALT_BRNO ORDER BY 1) RNUM FROM ( SELECT C.RGBR_CODE AS VALT_BRNO --등록지점 ,C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID ,C.CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE -- 01 본인 ,02 대리인 03 의뢰인 ,(CASE WHEN C.CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '01' THEN '본인' WHEN C.CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN '대리인' ELSE '의뢰인' END) CDD_TAGT_SECT_NM ,C.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE -- 고객구분 1 개인 ,2 영리법인 ,3 비영리 법인 ,C.TAGT_CLNT_NAME --고객명 ,C.ORIG_CLNT_NAME -- 원천 고객명 ,C.CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID -- 원천 고객번호 ,C.TAGT_ENNM --고객영문명 ,C.ORIG_ENNM --원천영문명 ,C.CDD_TAGT_CLNT_NO_CRYP TGT_CNO -- 대상 실명번호 ,C.CDD_ORIG_CLNT_NO_CRYP ORIG_CNO -- 원천 실명번호 ,C.CDD_FLFL_DATE -- CDD 등록일자 ,(SELECT CDD_FLFL_DATE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD WHERE CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID) O_CDD_FLFL_DATE -- 원천 CDD 등록일자 ,C.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE -- CDD 등록코드 ,(CASE WHEN C.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE <> '99' THEN NVL((SELECT CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL WHERE CMN_CODE_ID = '06757' AND DEL_YN='N' AND CMN_CDVL = C.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE), C.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE) ELSE '기타(' || TRIM(C.CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME) || ')' END ) CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME -- CDD 등록사유명 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD C , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD D WHERE 1=1 AND C.CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID = D.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND C.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE = 'A01' AND C.CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' --대리인 AND D.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2','3') --1:개인 2:영리법인 3:비영리법인 AND C.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '04' -- 계약기반거래 AND C.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' --CDD완료여부 AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE < #{tgtTrnEdt} ) AA ) T WHERE 1=1 AND RNUM <= 3

TGT_CLNT_NAME -- 대리인명 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TAGT_ENNM ELSE NULL END) TGT_ENNM -- 대리인 영문명 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TGT_CNO ELSE NULL END) TGT_CNO -- 대리인 실명번호 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN CDD_FLFL_DATE ELSE NULL END) TGT_CDD_DATE -- 대리인 CDD일자 ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY VALT_BRNO ORDER BY 1) RNUM FROM ( SELECT RGBR_CODE AS VALT_BRNO --등록지점 ,CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID ,CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE -- 01 본인 ,02 대리인 03 의뢰인 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '01' THEN '본인' WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN '대리인' ELSE '의뢰인' END) CDD_TAGT_SECT_NM ,CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE -- 고객구분 1 개인 ,2 영리법인 ,3 비영리 법인 ,TAGT_CLNT_NAME --고객명 ,ORIG_CLNT_NAME -- 원천 고객명 ,CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID -- 원천 고객번호 ,TAGT_ENNM --고객영문명 ,ORIG_ENNM --원천영문명 ,CDD_TAGT_CLNT_NO_CRYP TGT_CNO -- 대상 실명번호 ,CDD_ORIG_CLNT_NO_CRYP ORIG_CNO -- 원천 실명번호 ,CDD_FLFL_DATE -- CDD 등록일자 ,(SELECT CDD_FLFL_DATE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD WHERE CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID) O_CDD_FLFL_DATE -- 원천 CDD 등록일자 ,CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE -- CDD 등록코드 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '01' THEN '계좌개설및폐쇄' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '02' THEN '고객주요정보변경' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '03' THEN '약정및청약' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '04' THEN '계약기반거래' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '05' THEN '일회성금융거래(무통장송금)' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '06' THEN '퇴직연금' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '07' THEN '방카슈랑스' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '98' THEN '자금세탁우려' ELSE CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME END ) CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME -- CDD 등록사유명 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD C WHERE 1=1 AND C.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE = 'A01' AND C.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '04' -- 계약기반거래 AND C.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' --CDD완료여부 AND C.RGBR_CODE = '21310' -- IB 지원 AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE < #{tgtTrnEdt} ) AA ) T WHERE 1=1 AND RNUM <= 3

-- 3.1.3_R1_C1_T1 법인의 계좌 업무 처리 시 실소유자 정보의 등록 관리.xlsx --파일 15

FROM ( SELECT CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID RNMCNO ,VALT_BRNO -- 부점코드 ,(SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = VALT_BRNO) DPRT_NM --부점명 ,ORIG_CLNT_NAME -- 고객명 ,ORIG_ENNM -- 영문명 ,ORIG_CNO -- 실명번호 ,O_CDD_FLFL_DATE AS CDD_FLFL_DATE -- CDD 등록일자 ,CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TAGT_CLNT_NAME ELSE NULL END) TGT_CLNT_NAME -- 대리인명 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TAGT_ENNM ELSE NULL END) TGT_ENNM -- 대리인 영문명 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TGT_CNO ELSE NULL END) TGT_CNO -- 대리인 실명번호 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN CDD_FLFL_DATE ELSE NULL END) TGT_CDD_DATE -- 대리인 CDD일자 ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY VALT_BRNO ORDER BY 1) RNUM FROM ( SELECT RGBR_CODE AS VALT_BRNO --등록지점 ,CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID ,CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE -- 01 본인 ,02 대리인 03 의뢰인 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '01' THEN '본인' WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN '대리인' ELSE '의뢰인' END) CDD_TAGT_SECT_NM ,CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE -- 고객구분 1 개인 ,2 영리법인 ,3 비영리 법인 ,TAGT_CLNT_NAME --고객명 ,ORIG_CLNT_NAME -- 원천 고객명 ,CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID -- 원천 고객번호 ,TAGT_ENNM --고객영문명 ,ORIG_ENNM --원천영문명 ,CDD_TAGT_CLNT_NO_CRYP TGT_CNO -- 대상 실명번호 ,CDD_ORIG_CLNT_NO_CRYP ORIG_CNO -- 원천 실명번호 ,CDD_FLFL_DATE -- CDD 등록일자 ,(SELECT CDD_FLFL_DATE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD WHERE CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID) O_CDD_FLFL_DATE -- 원천 CDD 등록일자 ,CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE -- CDD 등록코드 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '01' THEN '계좌개설및폐쇄' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '02' THEN '고객주요정보변경' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '03' THEN '약정및청약' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '04' THEN '계약기반거래' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '05' THEN CDD 등록사유명 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD C WHERE 1=1 AND C.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE = 'A01' AND C.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2','3') --1:개인 2:영리법인 3:비영리법인 AND C.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '01' --계좌개설및폐쇄 AND C.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' --CDD완료여부 AND C.REL_OWNR_YN = 'Y' --실소유자여부 AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE < #{tgtTrnEdt} ) AA ) T WHERE 1=1 AND RNUM <= 1

FROM ( SELECT CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID RNMCNO ,VALT_BRNO -- 부점코드 ,(SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = VALT_BRNO) DPRT_NM --부점명 ,ORIG_CLNT_NAME -- 고객명 ,ORIG_ENNM -- 영문명 ,ORIG_CNO -- 실명번호 ,O_CDD_FLFL_DATE AS CDD_FLFL_DATE -- CDD 등록일자 ,CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TAGT_CLNT_NAME ELSE NULL END) TGT_CLNT_NAME -- 대리인명 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TAGT_ENNM ELSE NULL END) TGT_ENNM -- 대리인 영문명 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TGT_CNO ELSE NULL END) TGT_CNO -- 대리인 실명번호 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN CDD_FLFL_DATE ELSE NULL END) TGT_CDD_DATE -- 대리인 CDD일자 ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY VALT_BRNO ORDER BY 1) RNUM FROM ( SELECT RGBR_CODE AS VALT_BRNO --등록지점 ,CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID ,CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE -- 01 본인 ,02 대리인 03 의뢰인 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '01' THEN '본인' WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN '대리인' ELSE '의뢰인' END) CDD_TAGT_SECT_NM ,CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE -- 고객구분 1 개인 ,2 영리법인 ,3 비영리 법인 ,TAGT_CLNT_NAME --고객명 ,ORIG_CLNT_NAME -- 원천 고객명 ,CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID -- 원천 고객번호 ,TAGT_ENNM --고객영문명 ,ORIG_ENNM --원천영문명 ,CDD_TAGT_CLNT_NO_CRYP TGT_CNO -- 대상 실명번호 ,CDD_ORIG_CLNT_NO_CRYP ORIG_CNO -- 원천 실명번호 ,CDD_FLFL_DATE -- CDD 등록일자 ,(SELECT CDD_FLFL_DATE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD WHERE CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID) O_CDD_FLFL_DATE -- 원천 CDD 등록일자 ,CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE -- CDD 등록코드 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '01' THEN '계좌개설및폐쇄' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '02' THEN '고객주요정보변경' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '03' THEN '약정및청약' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '04' THEN '계약기반거래' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '05' THEN '일회성금융거래(무통장송금)' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '06' THEN '퇴직연금' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '07' THEN '방카슈랑스' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '98' THEN '자금세탁우려' ELSE CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME END ) CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME -- CDD 등록사유명 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD C WHERE 1=1 AND C.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE = 'A01' AND C.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2','3') --1:개인 2:영리법인 3:비영리법인 AND C.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '03' --약정및청약 AND C.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' --CDD완료여부 AND C.REL_OWNR_YN = 'N' --실소유자여부 AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE < #{tgtTrnEdt} ) AA ) T WHERE 1=1 AND RNUM <= 2 ) M

TGT_CLNT_NAME -- 대리인명 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TAGT_ENNM ELSE NULL END) TGT_ENNM -- 대리인 영문명 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TGT_CNO ELSE NULL END) TGT_CNO -- 대리인 실명번호 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN CDD_FLFL_DATE ELSE NULL END) TGT_CDD_DATE -- 대리인 CDD일자 ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY VALT_BRNO ORDER BY 1) RNUM FROM ( SELECT RGBR_CODE AS VALT_BRNO --등록지점 ,CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID ,CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE -- 01 본인 ,02 대리인 03 의뢰인 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '01' THEN '본인' WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN '대리인' ELSE '의뢰인' END) CDD_TAGT_SECT_NM ,CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE -- 고객구분 1 개인 ,2 영리법인 ,3 비영리 법인 ,TAGT_CLNT_NAME --고객명 ,ORIG_CLNT_NAME -- 원천 고객명 ,CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID -- 원천 고객번호 ,TAGT_ENNM --고객영문명 ,ORIG_ENNM --원천영문명 ,CDD_TAGT_CLNT_NO_CRYP TGT_CNO -- 대상 실명번호 ,CDD_ORIG_CLNT_NO_CRYP ORIG_CNO -- 원천 실명번호 ,CDD_FLFL_DATE -- CDD 등록일자 ,(SELECT CDD_FLFL_DATE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD WHERE CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID) O_CDD_FLFL_DATE -- 원천 CDD 등록일자 ,CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE -- CDD 등록코드 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '01' THEN '계좌개설및폐쇄' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '02' THEN '고객주요정보변경' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '03' THEN '약정및청약' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '04' THEN '계약기반거래' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '05' THEN '일회성금융거래(무통장송금)' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '06' THEN '퇴직연금' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '07' THEN '방카슈랑스' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '98' THEN '자금세탁우려' ELSE CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME END ) CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME -- CDD 등록사유명 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD C WHERE 1=1 AND C.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE = 'A01' AND C.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2','3') --1:개인 2:영리법인 3:비영리법인 AND C.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' --EDD대상여부 AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE < #{tgtTrnEdt} ) AA ) T WHERE 1=1 AND RNUM <= 3

SNO --순번 ,VALT_BRNO AS DATA01 ,DPRT_NM AS DATA02 ,ORIG_CLNT_NAME AS DATA03 -- 고객명 ,ORIG_ENNM AS DATA04 -- 영문명 ,ORIG_CNO AS DATA05 -- 실명번호 ,CDD_FLFL_DATE AS DATA06 -- CDD 등록일자 ,SUBSTRB(XCL_RSN_CNTNT, DATA15 ,'' DATA16 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'),'SYSTEM' FROM ( SELECT CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID RNMCNO ,VALT_BRNO -- 부점코드 ,(SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = VALT_BRNO) TAGT_CLNT_NAME ELSE NULL END) TGT_CLNT_NAME -- 대리인명 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TAGT_ENNM ELSE NULL END) TGT_ENNM -- 대리인 영문명 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN TGT_CNO ELSE NULL END) TGT_CNO -- 대리인 실명번호 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN CDD_FLFL_DATE ELSE NULL END) TGT_CDD_DATE -- 대리인 CDD일자 ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY VALT_BRNO ORDER BY 1) RNUM FROM ( SELECT RGBR_CODE AS VALT_BRNO --등록지점 ,CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID ,CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE -- 01 본인 ,02 대리인 03 의뢰인 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '01' THEN '본인' WHEN CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' THEN '대리인' ELSE '의뢰인' END) CDD_TAGT_SECT_NM ,CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE -- 고객구분 1 개인 ,2 영리법인 ,3 비영리 법인 ,TAGT_CLNT_NAME --고객명 ,ORIG_CLNT_NAME -- 원천 고객명 ,CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID -- 원천 고객번호 ,TAGT_ENNM --고객영문명 ,ORIG_ENNM --원천영문명 ,CDD_TAGT_CLNT_NO_CRYP TGT_CNO -- 대상 실명번호 ,CDD_ORIG_CLNT_NO_CRYP ORIG_CNO -- 원천 실명번호 ,CDD_FLFL_DATE -- CDD 등록일자 ,(SELECT CDD_FLFL_DATE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD WHERE CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CDD_ORIG_ENTY_ID) O_CDD_FLFL_DATE -- 원천 CDD 등록일자 ,CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE -- CDD 등록코드 ,(CASE WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '01' THEN '계좌개설및폐쇄' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '02' THEN '고객주요정보변경' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '03' THEN '약정및청약' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '04' THEN '계약기반거래' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '05' THEN '일회성금융거래(무통장송금)' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '06' THEN '퇴직연금' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '07' THEN '방카슈랑스' WHEN CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '98' THEN '자금세탁우려' ELSE CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME END ) CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME -- CDD 등록사유명 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD C WHERE 1=1 AND C.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE = 'A01' AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE < #{tgtTrnEdt} ) A ,( SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,DL_P_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO ,XCL_RSN_CNTNT --제외사유 FROM NIC66B WHERE 1=1 AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'STR' AND OK_CCD = '2' AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} ) B WHERE 1=1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.RNMCNO AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ) T WHERE 1=1 AND RNUM <= 3
